Fact.Name: Total interest
Fact.Description: Schedule B line 2. Add the amounts on line 1.

Fact.Name: Excludable savings bond interest
Fact.Description: Schedule B line 3. Excludable interest on series EE and I U.S. savings bonds issued after 1989.

Fact.Name: Taxable interest
Fact.Description: Schedule B line 4. Subtract line 3 from line 2. Enter the result here and on Form 1040, line 2b.

Fact.Name: Total ordinary dividends
Fact.Description: Schedule B line 6. Add the amounts on line 5. Enter the total here and on Form 1040, line 3b.

Fact.Name: Foreign financial account
Fact.Description: Schedule B line 7a. Had financial interest in or signature authority over a foreign financial account.

Fact.Name: Required to file FBAR
Fact.Description: Schedule B line 7a. Required to file FinCEN Form 114 to report foreign financial interest or signature authority.

Fact.Name: Foreign trust distribution
Fact.Description: Schedule B line 8. Received a distribution from, or was grantor of, or transferor to, a foreign trust.
